params.name: Marquis Bell
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (1.4%), Cathay Treasure Maps (10%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Apr 4, 1978, the Marquis Bells were played again after 2,000 years. On this day, the Marquis Bells were played in an auditorium of Bubei, 2400 years since the ancient instrument last created music. It was a medley of modern songs arranged by many famous musicians, including The East is Red, River on a Spring Night and Jasmine Flower. [Basic Info] Produced in: the Warring States Period
Material: Bronze
Numbers: 65 bells
Overall size: 748x335x273 cm
Overall weight: 2567 kg
Exh …
